text: Hey, is the API down? We're getting 503s on all requests since 9am.
Can you confirm what version of the SDK supports webhooks?
Thanks for the update, we'll check on our end.
Our migration to v2 is blocked - the batch endpoint returns 422 for payloads over 1MB.
Happy new year to the team!
We pushed the deploy, should be live in 30 min.
Is there a way to export audit logs to S3 directly?
We're seeing latency spikes on the /ingest endpoint since yesterday - is anything on your side?
Our team is available for the call at 3pm EST.
The SSO integration stopped working after your maintenance window last night.
Sounds good, we'll loop back after internal review.
